ConnectionStrings.Postgres: Host=localhost;Port=5432;Username=postgres;Password=<PASSWORD>;Database=redb;Pooling=true;Minimum Pool Size=0;Maximum Pool Size=100;Connection Idle Lifetime=10;Connection Pruning Interval=2;Timeout=15;Include Error Detail=true

Targets.Name: pg-audit
Targets.Uri: sql:INSERT INTO identity_audit_log(event_id, event_type, "timestamp", user_id, client_id, ip_address, user_agent, details) VALUES(@event_id, @event_type, @timestamp, @user_id, @client_id, @ip_address, @user_agent, @details::jsonb)?dataSource=#identity-audit-pg&outputType=None&param.event_id=${header.event_id}&param.event_type=${header.event_type}&param.timestamp=${header.timestamp}&param.user_id=${header.user_id}&param.client_id=${header.client_id}&param.ip_address=${header.ip_address}&param.user_agent=${header.user_agent}&param.details=${header.details}
